meta.title: Tåsen and Korsvoll house knowledge graph

sources.property: Kartverket Eiendomsregisteret public JSON API (matrikkel/bygninger) - no login
sources.unit_size_year_estimate: Hjemla (Schibsted) public unit API (consumer-service-hjemla-prod.propcloud.no) - size class (bruksareal range), build year, floors, value estimate - no login
sources.latest_transfer: 1881 Eiendomspriser public search service (latest tinglysingsdato and registered buyer/transferee)

meta.not_included: Exact sale prices and authoritative current-owner records are not collected.
meta.privacy: Contains personal names; intended for private/local use.
